title: Publisher Confirms, Windows, and Ambiguity · Go Retrieval
summary: A delayed handoff reconstructs publisher confirms, windows, and ambiguity from producer, broker, queue, delivery, Go runtime, and stakeholder evidence, then challenges one protocol or concurrency misconception. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a bounded Go confirm-window ledger after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Enable confirm mode before publication, continuously consume confirmations, and account for ack, nack, return, close, and unresolved sequence state.
Bound unconfirmed count, bytes, and age while preserving throughput, memory, fairness, and per-message outcome evidence; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Explain when confirms occur for unroutable messages, persistent classic queues, quorum queues, and multiple routed queues; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review Confirm Channel Contract
steps.instruction:
Order the Confirm Channel Contract RabbitMQ and Go messaging evidence cycle for this review task before implementing it.

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and Go Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review Confirm Channel Contract.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Confirm Channel Contract assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward. For RabbitMQ and Go Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review Confirm Channel Contract, keep Confirm Channel Contract connected to executable Go messaging decision evidence.

content.text: A review Go messaging team handles case 9482 during table-driven topology review for a tenant migration. Build deterministic Go evidence to bound outstanding confirms and preserve ambiguity when a channel closes before proof; retain rollback topology before deleting old bindings; then remove the parking binding and expose the remediation gap. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Enable confirm mode before publication, continuously consume confirmations, and account for ack, nack, return, close, and unresolved sequence state.
